description: Sending out light; shining brightly; emanating joy or health. 'Horae' names the quality of shining forth—light that reaches outward, beauty that cannot be contained, inner glow made visible.
sound_symbolism: The word shines outward. 'Ho' begins with open breath, warmth released. Then 'ra' radiates in all directions, light spreading. Finally 'e' opens to completion, the radiance fully expressed.
grammatical_notes: Adjective before a noun: 'horae horathe' (radiant dawn). Compare 'sileta' (sun), which names the object rather than its radiance.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Radiant energy from the sun powers sustainable life—the original source freely giving light to all.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Radiance arises from inner clarity—when the mind is clear, its light naturally shines forth.
